title: AI Engineer Interns
job_description:
Type : Unpaid/ Revenue Partnership Basis

Job Overview

We are seeking highly motivated AI Engineer Interns who are passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and emerging technologies. The intern will assist in designing, developing, and testing AI-based solutions while gaining hands-on experience in real-world AI applications.

This internship offers an opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI technologies including machine learning models, data processing pipelines, AI automation tools, and intelligent systems.

The ideal candidate should possess strong analytical skills, programming knowledge, and a curiosity to explore innovative AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities
AI Model Development

Assist in building and training machine learning and deep learning models.

Support development of AI-based applications and automation systems.

Work on data preprocessing, feature engineering, and dataset preparation.

Research & Innovation

Conduct research on latest AI technologies, tools, and frameworks.

Experiment with new AI models and techniques to improve performance.

Analyze research papers and implement experimental solutions.

Data Analysis

Collect, clean, and analyze structured and unstructured datasets.

Assist in building data pipelines for AI model training.

AI Integration

Help integrate AI models into applications, APIs, or software systems.

Work with developers to deploy AI models into production environments.

Testing & Optimization

Evaluate AI models for performance, accuracy, and scalability.

Optimize models to improve prediction accuracy and efficiency.

Required Skills

Strong knowledge of Python programming

Basic understanding of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence

Familiarity with libraries such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, or Keras

Knowledge of data analysis tools (Pandas, NumPy)

Basic understanding of statistics and algorithms

Problem-solving and analytical thinking

Preferred Qualifications

Experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP)

Knowledge of Computer Vision

Familiarity with LLMs, AI APIs, or generative AI tools

Basic knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

Understanding of Git and software development workflows

Eligibility Criteria

Pursuing or recently completed Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related field

Strong interest in AI research and development

Open to students, fresh graduates, and AI enthusiasts

Internship Benefits

Hands-on experience with real-world AI projects

Opportunity to work with AI engineers and researchers

Exposure to machine learning pipelines and AI product development

Internship certificate and performance-based recommendation

Opportunity for full-time role based on performance

title: Software Engineer Intern
job_description:
Software Engineer Intern (Unpaid Internship)

Work Type: Hybrid
Duration: 6 Months
Hours: Negotiable
Type : Unpaid/ Revenue Partnership Basis

About the Role

We are seeking a passionate Software Engineer Intern to join our development team in a hybrid work environment. This unpaid internship offers hands-on experience building and maintaining full-stack web applications using modern technologies while working closely with experienced developers.

Responsibilities

* Develop and maintain web applications using React.js on the frontend
* Build and integrate backend services using Node.js
* Work with MongoDB for data storage and management
* Assist in designing RESTful APIs
* Debug, test, and optimize application performance
* Collaborate with the team during planning, stand-ups, and code reviews
* Document technical implementations and workflows
* Preferred Technical Skills
* Basic to intermediate knowledge of React.js
* Familiarity with Node.js and Express.js
* Understanding of MongoDB and NoSQL databases
* Experience with JavaScript (ES6+)
* Familiarity with Git/GitHub and agile development practices is a plus

Requirements

* Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science or a related field
* Strong interest in full-stack web development
* Willingness to learn, take feedback, and work in a team environment
* Good communication and problem-solving skills

What You’ll Gain

* Real-world experience with the MERN stack
* Mentorship from professional software engineers
* Exposure to production-level code and development workflows
* Portfolio-ready projects
* Certificate or letter of recommendation upon completion (if applicable)

Compensation

This is an unpaid internship intended for learning and skill development.

title: Full Stack Developer Intern
job_description:
Rretoriq is an AI-powered communication training platform designed to help students improve their speaking skills through structured practice and real-time AI feedback.

We are looking for a Full Stack Developer Intern who is passionate about building real-world products and wants hands-on experience working in a startup environment. The ideal candidate should be comfortable working across both frontend and backend technologies and eager to contribute to improving and expanding the platform.

Since the core product is already under development, the role will involve enhancing existing features, maintaining the codebase, UI enhancements, fixing bugs, adding new functionalities and maintaining the system.

The candidate will work closely with the founding team to improve and expand the Rretoriq platform, contributing to both frontend and backend development.

**Required Skills**

**Frontend**
* HTML, CSS, JavaScript
* React.js
* TypeScript (basic understanding)
* Responsive UI development
* Familiarity with modern frontend tools (Vite / Tailwind preferred)

**Backend**
* Node.js
* REST API development
* Understanding of serverless functions

**Database**
* Basic knowledge of NoSQL databases
* Experience working with Firebase Firestore or similar databases

**General Development**
* Git / GitHub version control
* Understanding of debugging and problem-solving
* Ability to understand and work with existing codebases

**Good to Have**

* Experience with Firebase ecosystem
* Familiarity with AI API integration (Gemini / OpenAI)
* Experience with serverless deployments (Vercel / Firebase)
* Knowledge of validation libraries such as Zod
* Exposure to testing frameworks
* Participation in hackathons or personal development projects

title: Pivony Academy — Web Crawling & Data Pipelines Intern
job_description:
**About Pivony Academy**

Pivony Academy is an early-career program designed for candidates who want to specialize in web data collection, crawling systems, and data pipelines.

We are looking for interns who want hands-on experience building and improving systems that collect, process, validate, and organize web data in reliable and scalable ways.

**What You Will Work On**

* Web scraping and crawling workflows
* Python-based data collection services
* Data extraction and parsing tasks
* Containerized development environments
* Monitoring and debugging unstable workflows
* Data cleaning, validation, and quality checks
* Building and improving data pipelines
* Writing technical documentation for systems and processes

**What We Look For**
* Strong fundamentals in Python
* Good understanding of HTML, APIs, and structured/unstructured data
* Comfort with Linux and terminal workflows
* Basic knowledge of Docker or containerized applications
* Interest in web scraping, crawling, and automation
* Ability to debug technical issues step by step
* Good written communication in English
* Curiosity, persistence, and attention to detail

**Nice to Have**
* Experience with parsing libraries or browser automation tools
* Familiarity with proxies, networking basics, or cloud environments
* Understanding of retries, timeouts, and failure handling
* Experience working with datasets or ETL workflows
* GitHub projects that show practical engineering work

**Who Should Apply**
* Final-year Computer Science students
* Graduates who completed their degree within the last 12 months
* Candidates who want practical experience in data engineering and web data systems
* Candidates who enjoy solving messy, real-world technical problems

title: Product Manager (Intern - Technical)
job_description:
**About the Role**
We are looking for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Technical Product Manager Intern to work closely with our product and engineering teams. This role is perfect for someone with a background in software development and a strong interest in building innovative products in the fintech domain. As a Technical Product Manager Intern, you will bridge the gap between technical execution and strategic product vision, ensuring seamless collaboration and delivery.

If you are a problem-solver with a passion for building user-centric products and leveraging your technical expertise, we’d love to hear from you!

**What You'll Do**
* Product Ownership: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define product requirements, prioritize features, and deliver innovative solutions.
* Technical Understanding: Use your coding and technical background to understand system architectures, APIs, and technical constraints, ensuring clear communication with developers.
* Roadmap Execution: Assist in planning and maintaining the product roadmap, ensuring alignment with business goals and user needs.
* Requirements Gathering: Translate business needs into technical specifications, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with designers, engineers, and stakeholders to balance technical feasibility with user needs.
* Agile Practices: Participate in sprint planning, daily standups, and retrospectives to ensure efficient product development.
* Data-Driven Decision Making: Analyze user feedback, product metrics, and industry trends to inform product decisions.
* Quality Assurance: Support testing efforts and ensure features meet requirements before launch.


**What We're Looking For:**
Core Skills & Attributes
* Technical Background: Strong foundation in coding, system design, or software development (experience with APIs, backend systems, or fintech platforms is a plus).
* Analytical Thinking: Ability to break down complex problems and prioritize effectively.
* User-Centric Mindset: Passion for creating products that solve real user pain points.
* Communication: Exceptional skills in translating technical concepts into simple, actionable terms for diverse stakeholders.
* Project Management Skills: Organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple tasks in a dynamic environment.

**Bonus Skills**
* Experience with Agile methodologies (Scrum or Kanban).
* Familiarity with fintech concepts like payments, investments, or credit.
* Knowledge of tools like Jira, Confluence, or similar product management platforms.
* Hands-on experience with data analysis tools (e.g., Excel, SQL, or analytics dashboards).

**Why Join Us?**
* Hands-On Experience: Take ownership of meaningful projects and contribute to shaping a real-world fintech product.
* Technical Exposure: Work closely with developers, designers, and stakeholders to understand the technical and functional aspects of product building.
* Learning Opportunity: Gain mentorship and insights from experienced product managers and industry professionals.
* Fast-Paced Environment: Be part of a rapidly evolving fintech space where your contributions can have a direct impact.

title: Reactjs and API integration Engineer
job_description:
**Only for 2027,2028 passing out year students**
**Only for 2027,2028 passing out year students**
**Only for 2027,2028 passing out year students**

**🎯 About the Role:**
We’re hiring a passionate Frontend Intern who is skilled in ReactJS and Tailwind CSS, and ready to work on scalable web applications. You’ll be responsible for building clean UIs, integrating APIs, and managing state using Redux. You must also be confident in handling authentication, routing (with React Router DOM), and working across shared codebases.

**🛠️ What You’ll Do:**
*  Develop responsive and modern UIs using ReactJS + Tailwind CSS
*  Use Redux for state management and React Router DOM for navigation
*  Integrate and handle APIs with proper loading, error, and success states
*  Implement JWT authentication, secure routing, and storage (local/session)
*  Work across multiple codebases and contribute/debug features quickly
*  Collaborate with backend developers and follow clean API integration practices
*  Optimize UI performance, implement caching and code-splitting where needed
*  Maintain clean Git workflows and write modular, reusable components

**✅ Requirements:**
1. Strong experience with ReactJS and Tailwind CSS
2. Hands-on with Redux, React Router DOM, and middleware like Redux Thunk or Saga
3. Good understanding of API calls, error handling, and auth flows
4. Comfort with debugging, cloning, and contributing to live codebases
5. Familiar with responsive design, component structure, and best practices
6. Working knowledge of Git, browser dev tools, and basic CLI
7. Quick learner and strong problem-solving skills

💡 Nice-to-Have:
Familiarity with libraries like Chakra UI, MUI
Experience with Next.js, React Query
Startup or previous internship experience

title: Angular Full Stack Developer — Intern
job_description:

title: Software Engineer Intern | Unpaid
job_description:
Unpaid 6-Month Software Engineering Internship

Work From Home | Internship Certificate | Mentorship (During & After Internship) | Join a Team of 10 Developers | Flexible Hours | IST timezone | You get to learn and work on each of these tech - We have 5 apps we support on web, iOS and Android. Frontend is expo react native. Backend is Node and Mongo. Devops in AWS. For automation, we use Detox and Playwright. 


Either MERN or ReactNative or AWS - you need to know one of them really well. 

About the Internship
Are you passionate about building real-world software and eager to learn across the full stack? Join our dynamic team of developers and gain hands-on experience in:

React Native (Android/iOS)
NodeJS / DocumentDB
AWS Cloud Services
Frontend/Backend Automation

You will work alongside experienced mentors, receive an Internship Certificate, and contribute to impactful projects. Our team consists of both paid and unpaid interns.

What We Offer
Work from home with flexible hours
Mentorship during and after the internship
Exposure to multiple engineering areas: Frontend, Backend, DevOps, Automation, QA
Internship Certificate upon successful completion
Potential Pre-Placement Offer (PPO) for top performers (subject to company requirements and performance)

Requirements
Technical Skills:
Proficiency in Backend Development and Database Management
Familiarity with React Native and NodeJS is a plus

Availability:
Able to join daily sync-ups at 7 AM
Open to working on Saturdays
Able to commit an average of 5 hours per day to internship tasks
Must have less than 5 hours of daily college commitments (including travel, classes, assignments, labs, exams, and freelance work)
Can commit to a 6-month unpaid internship
Can join within 1 week

Attitude:
Willingness to learn and work across different domains
Comfortable with both online and offline assignments
Apply only if you are comfortable with an unpaid internship

Responsibilities
Develop and maintain backend features (NodeJS), with occasional frontend tasks (React Native)
Write unit and end-to-end (E2E) automation tests for our applications
Collaborate with team members and participate in code reviews and daily sync-ups

Hiring Process (Same for Paid/Unpaid Roles)
Offline Coding Exercise: Complete an academic coding assignment (3–10 hours, depending on experience)
Live Coding (GMeet): Modify and discuss your code in a live session (1–3 hours)
Final Interview: Phone round with our CEO (30 minutes)

We do not retain, store, or share your assignment. It is used solely for evaluating your application.

After submission, we typically respond within a few days, and at most within 1 month, with next steps—either rejection or progression to the live coding round. If you are not selected, we provide constructive feedback. The entire process can take as little as 1 week or up to 1.5 months. If this timeline or the effort required feels excessive for an unpaid role, we understand and encourage you to apply elsewhere.

We have considered Indian labor laws in designing this assignment process.

Selection Statistics:
50% of applicants receive a take-home assignment
10% of those submit the assignment
30% of submitters progress to the live coding round
30% of live coding participants reach the final interview
70% of final interviewees are offered the internship
Overall, the acceptance rate is approximately 0.3% (roughly 1 out of 300 applicants is selected).

Additional Notes
This is an unpaid internship; there is no financial compensation. Apply only if you are comfortable with an unpaid internship and are eager to learn and contribute.

You will gain significant experience in full stack development and work on real-world projects. Pre-Placement Offers (PPOs) may be extended to exceptional interns in the final month, based on performance, team needs, and company capacity. 4 out of 12 interns who joined in Jan 2025 became full time in July 2025.

title: Full Stack Web Developer
job_description:
**Full Stack Web Developer**

Location: Remote (India preferred)
Employment Type: Full-time / Intern

**About the Role**

We are looking for a skilled Full Stack Web Developer to join our team and help build scalable, high-performance web applications. The ideal candidate should be comfortable working on both frontend and backend development and be able to take ownership of features from concept to deployment.

**Key Responsibilities**

- Develop and maintain modern web applications

- Build responsive and user-friendly frontend interfaces

- Design and develop secure RESTful APIs

- Implement authentication and authorization systems

- Design and manage databases

- Optimize application performance and scalability

- Deploy and maintain applications on cloud platforms

- Collaborate with designers and stakeholders to deliver high-quality features

**Required Skills**

Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+)

Experience with React.js / Next.js (or similar frontend framework)

Backend experience with Node.js + Express (or similar framework)

Experience with relational or NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL / MySQL / MongoDB)

Understanding of API development and third-party integrations

Familiarity with Git and version control

**Preferred Qualifications**

Experience with Firebase or Supabase

Experience with cloud deployment (AWS, Vercel, DigitalOcean, etc.)

Knowledge of authentication systems (JWT, OAuth)

Understanding of security best practices

Experience building dashboard-based or SaaS applications

**What We’re Looking For**

Strong problem-solving skills

Ability to work independently

Clean and maintainable coding practices

Good communication skills

**How to Apply**
Please share your resume, GitHub profile, and links to live projects (if available).

title: Software Intern – AI / Python (BFSI AI Voice Agents)
job_description:
Zynnex AI is an AI-driven fintech company building AI voice and chat agents for the Wealth and Lending (BFSI) sector. Our technology helps financial institutions automate customer interactions, improve conversion, and operate 24/7 at enterprise scale.

We are looking for a Software Intern who is excited about building innovative AI products and working on real-world AI applications.

As part of the engineering team, you will work on building AI voice agents, backend services, and automation tools for fintech use cases.

**Responsibilities**
* Build and improve AI voice agents and automation tools
* Develop backend logic using Python
* Assist in building AI models and LLM-based workflows
* Integrate APIs and build scalable AI solutions for BFSI use cases
* Collaborate with the product and engineering team

**Requirements**
* B.Tech (4th year) student or recent graduate
* Good knowledge of Python
* Interest in AI / Machine Learning / LLMs
* Strong problem-solving mindset
* Passion for building real-world AI products

**What We Offer**
* Paid internship (stipend provided)
* Hands-on experience building real AI products in fintech
* Exposure to AI models, voice agents, and automation tools

**Work Schedule**
* 6-day work week (Monday – Saturday)

title: Software Engineering Intern
job_description:
PLEASE NOTE BEFORE APPLYING: This is a strictly UNPAID internship with no financial compensation or stipends. Please apply only if you are comfortable with an unpaid position. Additionally, please note that this role will not convert into a full-time employment offer once the internship tenure ends.

🎓 CANDIDATES PURSUING OR HOLDING A DEGREE IN COMPUTER SCIENCE, SOFTWARE ENGINEERING, OR AEROSPACE ENGINEERING WILL BE HIGHLY PREFERRED.

About Us
At OneArc Space Technologies, we are pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the Indian space and tech industry as we build the computational and engineering foundations for the nation's first reusable rocket. We are looking for a highly analytical, strategic, and driven Software Engineering Intern to work closely with our core founding and engineering team. If you are looking to gain deep hands-on experience solving frontier problems in aerospace software, computational modeling, and control systems, we want you on board!

What You'll Do (Responsibilities):

1. Assist the core engineering team in developing, testing, and deploying software for computational models, trajectory optimization, or flight control systems.
2. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code in languages such as C, C++, Python, or MATLAB.
3. Conduct debugging, performance optimization, and unit testing for simulation frameworks and internal tools.
4. Help prepare software documentation, system architecture diagrams, and technical requirements.
5. Identify bottlenecks in current algorithms or codebases and suggest actionable improvements.
6. Support the team with setting up testing environments, CI/CD pipelines, and general engineering tasks as needed to accelerate our development roadmap.

What We’re Looking For (Requirements):

1. Strong Preference: Currently pursuing or recently graduated with a B.Tech/M.Tech or equivalent in 2. Computer Science, Aerospace Engineering, or related technical fields.
3. A keen interest in the space technology, rocketry, or deep-tech startup ecosystem.
4. Exceptional analytical, debugging, and algorithmic problem-solving skills.
5. Proficiency in core programming languages (C/C++, Python) and familiarity with development tools (Git, Linux, etc.).
6. Self-starter attitude with the ability to take ownership of technical tasks in a fully remote environment.
7. Excellent written and verbal communication skills to collaborate effectively across distributed teams.

What You Get (Compensation & Perks):

1. Certificate of Completion at the end of your internship tenure.
2. Letter of Recommendation (LOR) based on your performance.
3. Valuable hands-on experience in aerospace software engineering and deep-tech startup operations working directly with the founders.
4. Flexible remote working hours.
